content:

Small businesses often struggle to compete with big brands in marketing. But AI tools are changing the game!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Marketing Content Creation

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps small businesses create professional marketing content without expensive agencies.

### Rytr for Small Business Marketing
- **Social media posts**: Consistent content for all platforms
- **Email marketing**: Engaging emails that convert
- **Ad copy**: Compelling ads that get clicks

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

## [[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]]: Professional Graphics

[[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]] lets small businesses create professional graphics without a designer.

### Canva for Small Business
- **Brand templates**: Consistent visual identity
- **Social media sizes**: Perfect dimensions for every platform
- **Magic Edit**: Quick modifications with AI
